manifest.author: votsz
manifest.changelog:
CHANGELOG DETAILED 🇺🇸

■ The backup was remade due to problems of some conflicting flags causing crashes and high battery consumption. In this version, these two problems were corrected.

■ The reordered buttons have been removed at base 434.0.0.0.8, so it is no longer possible to change the location of the buttons
manifest.name: votsz's Backup
manifest.description: Backup for those who want new functions before the public, maximum quality and Stable
